items.title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: A sell-off in tech names pulled the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite to a losing session on Tuesday. The Dow, which briefly touched a fresh high, also closed lower.

items.title: S&P 500 falls for a second day after AMD earnings, weak jobs data: Live updates
items.description: Tech put on the worst performance of the 11 sectors in the S&P 500, falling more than 2% on Tuesday.

items.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Exxon Mobil, Lockheed Martin, Honeywell International and AMREP
items.description: Exxon Mobil anchors Zacks' latest top stock reports as energy, defense and industrial leaders show resilience amid mixed macro signals.

items.title: Return Trends At Honeywell International (NASDAQ:HON) Aren't Appealing
